svg.title: CAN-7USAT Ground Station Architecture Flow
svg.desc: A colourful architecture flow diagram showing the full ground station pipeline: hardware, software, data flow, commands, and recovery for the CAN-7USAT CanSat mission.
svg.text: IN-SPACe CAN-7USAT 2026 — Bennett University Astronomy Club

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Yagi antenna setup for the CanSat ground station')
sendPrompt('How does the XBee Pro S2C USB explorer connect to the ground station laptop?')
sendPrompt('What software runs on the ground station laptop for CanSat telemetry?')
sendPrompt('How does the telemetry parser decode CanSat CSV packets?')
sendPrompt('What panels does the real-time GCS dashboard show for the CanSat mission?')
sendPrompt('How does the vertical pollution profile chart work in the GCS dashboard?')
sendPrompt('How does the live GNSS map and guidance display work in the CanSat GCS?')
sendPrompt('What does the auto-CSV logging system do in the CanSat ground station?')
g.text: 🕐 DS3231 RTC UTC timestamps per packet

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What RF commands can the ground station send to the CanSat?')
sendPrompt('How does the ground station display the CanSat flight state machine in real time?')
g.text: Active state highlighted in real-time on GCS

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the recovery procedure for the CanSat after landing?')
g.text: 💡 Status LED blinking on cansat body
📍 Last GPS coordinates TX'd to GCS

svg.text: CAN-7USAT V5.0 — Bennett University Astronomy Club — IN-SPACe 2026
